text: A short communication exercise for two this week.

metadata.tone_guidance: Keep it easy, warm, and quick to answer.
steps: Each partner writes one sentence about communication.
Take turns reading without interrupting.
Reflect back what you heard in your own words.
Agree on one small action before you finish.
